stack.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 via @tailwindcss/postcss; OweMe design tokens as CSS custom properties in app/globals.css mapped through @theme inline (bg/card/ink/muted/faint/divider/fill/brand/gold/danger/info + tints); dark mode via prefers-color-scheme media query; card shadow token; .amount utility class for money figures

fonts.note: layout.tsx comment claims these are the same faces as the mobile app; the app font registry records Space Grotesk, not Sora

staticExport.config: next.config.ts: output "export", trailingSlash true, images.unoptimized true
staticExport.rationale: client-rendered admin app, all data intended to load client-side against the OweMe admin API, deployable on any static host
staticExport.outputDir: out/ (gitignored, stale local build present on disk)

stack.routing: one route group (shell) wraps all authenticated screens in components/shell.tsx chrome; /login sits outside the group; business detail is a static route selecting its record client-side via useSearchParams

components/shell.tsx: Shell (sidebar chrome, mobile slide-over, hardcoded footer identity)
lib/nav.ts: navSections (single registry of all sidebar routes)

fixtureConvention: One fixture module per screen in lib/fixtures/, imported by exactly one page via the @/lib/fixtures/* alias. Each module exports a typed constant named <screen>DemoData (e.g. overviewDemoData: OverviewDemoData) plus its supporting types and, for business detail, plan metadata helpers (planMeta, planOrder, enterpriseBanding, bundleCapPerMonth). Money is integer kobo formatted through lib/format helpers. README declares the repo is at UI stage: every screen renders *DemoData fixtures and nothing touches the live backend; the *DemoData suffix is the marker for data the admin API must replace.
